member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Extensions.MSBuild.Resources.ExtensionResources.MSBuildExtensionsDescription
member.summary: Extension used to pass parameters from MSBuild node and the hosts

member.name: T:Microsoft.Testing.Platform.MSBuild.MSBuildExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding MSBuild support to the test application builder.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Testing.Platform.MSBuild.MSBuildExtensions.AddMSBuild(Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder.ITestApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds MSBuild support to the test application builder.
member.param: The test application builder.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Testing.Platform.MSBuild.TestingPlatformBuilderHook
member.summary: This class is used by Microsoft.Testing.Platform.MSBuild to hook into the Testing Platform Builder to add MSBuild support.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Testing.Platform.MSBuild.TestingPlatformBuilderHook.AddExtensions(Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Builder.ITestApplicationBuilder,System.String[])
member.summary: Adds MSBuild support to the Testing Platform Builder.
member.param: The test application builder.
The command line arguments.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Testing.Platform.IPC.NamedPipeServer.InternalLoopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 4 bytes = message size ------- Payload ------- 4 bytes = serializer id x bytes = object buffer.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Helpers.ExitCodes
member.summary: We use positive exit codes for failure because POSIX/BASH exit codes are unsigned 8-bit integers. On POSIX systems the standard exit code is 0 for success and any number from 1 to 255 for anything else.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Helpers.TimeoutHelper.DefaultHangTimeoutMilliseconds
member.summary: Gets defaultAntiHangTimeout* values are used as timeout for every wait operation in the test platform. Are not intended for any timeout logic, but only to avoid infinite waits in case of test platform hangs.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Testing.Platform.Helpers.TimeSpanParser.GetRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?<value>^\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?)\\s*(?<suffix>ms|mil|m|h|d|s?[a-z]*)$
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ "value" capture group.
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a Unicode digit greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ "suffix" capture group.
○ Match with 4 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [DHMdhm].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Ss] greedily, optionally.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Za-z\u212A] atomically any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.IndexOf``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},``0,System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0})
member.summary: Searches for the specified value and returns the index of its first occurrence. If not found, returns -1. Values are compared using IEquatable{T}.Equals(T).

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.IndexOfAny``1(System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},System.ReadOnlySpan{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``0})
member.summary: Searches for the first index of any of the specified values similar to calling IndexOf several times with the logical OR operator. If not found, returns -1.

member.summary: Appends the specified interpolated string followed by the default line terminator to the end of the current StringBuilder object.

member.summary: Generates an infinite sequence that begins with and yields additional values each incremented by .

member.summary: Generates a sequence that begins with and yields additional values each incremented by until is reached.

member.summary: Tries to parse a span of UTF-8 bytes into a value.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$68F3962AE5697E254AA596E55C7A8792.Parse(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Parse a span of UTF-8 bytes into a value.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.ExtractToDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously extracts all the files in the specified archive to a directory on the file system.
member.param: The path to the archive to extract.
The path to the directory in which to place the extracted files.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous extract operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.ExtractToDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously extracts all the files in the specified archive to a directory on the file system.
member.param: The path to the archive to extract.
The path to the directory in which to place the extracted files.
true to overwrite existing files; false otherwise.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous extract operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.ExtractToDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Text.Encoding,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously extracts all the files in the specified archive to a directory on the file system and uses the specified character encoding for entry names.
member.param: The path to the archive to extract.
The path to the directory in which to place the extracted files.
The encoding to use when reading entry names in this archive.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous extract operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.ExtractToDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Text.Encoding,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously extracts all the files in the specified archive to a directory on the file system and uses the specified character encoding for entry names.
member.param: The path to the archive to extract.
The path to the directory in which to place the extracted files.
The encoding to use when reading entry names in this archive.
true to overwrite existing files; false otherwise.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous extract operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.CreateFromDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously creates a zip archive that contains the files and directories from the specified directory.
member.param: The path to the directory to archive.
The path of the archive to create.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous create operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.CreateFromDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.IO.Compression.CompressionLevel,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously creates a zip archive that contains the files and directories from the specified directory and uses the specified compression level.
member.param: The path to the directory to archive.
The path of the archive to create.
The compression level to use.
true to include the directory name from sourceDirectoryName at the root of the archive; false otherwise.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous create operation.

member.name: M:Polyfills.Polyfill.<G>$4E14A39FD01773A148FA55FFD9F99471.CreateFromDirectoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.IO.Compression.CompressionLevel,System.Boolean,System.Text.Encoding,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously creates a zip archive that contains the files and directories from the specified directory, uses the specified compression level and character encoding for entry names.
member.param: The path to the directory to archive.
The path of the archive to create.
The compression level to use.
true to include the directory name from sourceDirectoryName at the root of the archive; false otherwise.
The encoding to use when reading or writing entry names in this archive.
The token to monitor for cancellation requests.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous create operation.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GetRegex_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the GetRegex method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GetRegex_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GetRegex_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GetRegex_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GetRegex_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GetRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GetRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GetRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GetRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_nonAscii_326E1FD0AD567A84CAD13F2BE521A57789829F59D59ABE37F9E111D0182B6601
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzK".
